extensionDescription.message: Log your browsing history with AI summaries into local SQLite storage. Optional Obsidian integration.

lmStudioModelPlaceholder.message: Model name (optional, uses currently loaded model)

filterDisabledDesc.message: Record all visited websites regardless of domain.
filterDisabledDesc.description: Description for the Disabled domain filter mode

filterWhitelistDesc.message: Only record websites from domains in your whitelist.
filterWhitelistDesc.description: Description for the Whitelist domain filter mode

filterBlacklistDesc.message: Record all websites except those in your blacklist.
filterBlacklistDesc.description: Description for the Blacklist domain filter mode

ublockHelp.message:
Paste uBlock Origin or hosts format filters
uBlock: ||hostname^, @@||hostname^, *, !Comments
hosts: 0.0.0.0/127.0.0.1 hostname (#comments supported)

modeADesc.message:
Summarize page content using only the browser's built-in AI, without sending data externally.
Currently not supported on most browsers.

modeBDesc.message:
Browser built-in AI summary → PII masking → Cloud AI refinement.
Currently not supported on most browsers.

modeCDesc.message:
Send only masked data to cloud AI (including LM Studio and Ollama).
For environments where browser built-in AI is not available.

modeDDesc.message:
Send raw text directly to cloud AI.
Prioritize speed.

confirmBeforeSendingManual.message: Confirm masking result before sending (manual save only)

autoSavePrivacyBehavior.message: Auto-save behavior when privacy concern detected

autoSaveBehaviorSkip.message: Skip and keep in history for later registration

confirmContentDesc.message: You can review and edit the content to be saved to Obsidian.

cannotRecordHttpHttps.message: Current page is not an HTTP/HTTPS page

domainAlreadyExists.message: Domain "{domain}" already exists in the list

recordError.description: Error message shown when manual recording fails in dashboard

connectionError.message: Please refresh the page and try again

domainBlockedError.message: This domain is not allowed to be recorded. Do you want to record it anyway?

successConnected.message: Success! Connected to Obsidian. Settings Saved.

successAllConnected.message: Success! Connected to both Obsidian and AI. Settings Saved.

acceptCertificate.message: Click here to accept self-signed certificate

errorPort.message: Error: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535.

errorDuration.message: Error: Minimum visit duration must be a non-negative number.

errorScrollDepth.message: Error: Minimum scroll depth must be a number between 0 and 100.

errorContentScriptNotAvailable.message: Cannot fetch content from this page. Please reload the page and try again.

errorPrivateNetworkAccess.message: Access to private network address is not allowed: {hostname}

errorLocalhostAccess.message: Access to localhost is not allowed for filter imports

exportDesc.message: Save your current settings to a JSON file.

importDesc.message: Restore settings from a previously exported JSON file.

importLogsDesc.message: Import browsing history records from a JSON file exported from the Export Logs panel.

confirmImportDesc.message: Current settings will be overwritten. Continue?

confirmImportNote.message: Note: Please review the settings below before importing.

dropZoneLabel.description: ARIA label for the drop zone area where users can drag and drop uBlock filter files

promptHelp.message: Use {{content}} as a placeholder for the page content. The prompt will be used when generating summaries.

promptSystemHelp.message: Optional system prompt for OpenAI-compatible providers.

promptTextPlaceholder.message:
Summarize the following web page content in Japanese...

{{content}}

confirmDeletePrompt.message: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?

confirmClearAllMessage.message: This action cannot be undone. All browsing history stored in SQLite will be deleted. Continue?

importPreviewNote.message: Note: Full settings will be applied. API keys and lists are included in the file.

importNoSignatureWarning.message:
⚠️ This settings file contains no signature.

Signatures are used to prevent settings file tampering.
It is recommended not to import files from untrusted sources.

Do you want to continue importing?

errorNetwork.message: A network error occurred. Please check your internet connection.

errorAuth.message: An authentication error occurred. Please check your API key.

errorRateLimit.message: Request limit reached. Please try again later.

errorServer.message: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

errorUrlNotAllowed.message: Access to this URL is not allowed. Please check if the base URL is registered in the settings.

errorObsidianConnection.message: Failed to connect to Obsidian. Please check if Obsidian is running.

errorDailyNoteSave.message: Failed to save to daily note.

masterPasswordDesc.message: Protect your settings with a master password. Required for encrypted export/import.

encryptApiKeysDesc.message: API keys will be encrypted with your master password

encryptOnExportDesc.message: Exported settings file will be encrypted with your master password

requirePasswordOnImportDesc.message: Password will be required to import encrypted settings

setMasterPasswordDesc.message: Create a master password to protect your settings. This password cannot be recovered.

changeMasterPasswordDesc.message: Enter your current master password to change it.

enterMasterPasswordDesc.message: Enter your master password to continue.

passwordTooShort.message: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

importPasswordRequired.message:
This settings file is encrypted. You need to enter your master password to decrypt and import the settings.

Do you want to continue?

privacyDialogBody.message: A privacy concern was detected on this page ($REASON$). Save anyway?

notifyPrivacyConfirmBody.message: Privacy concern detected on "$TITLE$" ($REASON$). Save this page?

privatePageWarning.message: This page may contain private information (detected: $REASON$). Save anyway?

whitelistHelp.message: Domains in this list will be recorded (when Whitelist mode is enabled)

blacklistHelp.message: Domains in this list will be excluded (when Blacklist mode is enabled)

ublockFormatDesc.message: Advanced: Import filter lists from uBlock Origin

domainCheckLabel.message: Check if a URL will be recorded

historyDescription.message: URLs recorded by Yasumaro. Use the search box to filter entries. Click × to delete an individual URL.

historyRetentionPolicy.message: Shows records from the past 7 days (up to 10,000 entries). Older entries are automatically removed.

maskedBadgeTitle.message: Masked {count} personal info item(s) before sending to AI

pendingSectionTitle.message: Pages that could not be recorded

pendingSectionDesc.message: These pages were skipped due to privacy headers (Cache-Control, Set-Cookie, etc.). You can manually record them here.

diagConnectionPlaceholder.message: Click "Test Connection" to check the Obsidian API connection.

diagDescription.message: Check storage usage, verify the Obsidian REST API connection, and view extension information.

diagMigrateConfirm.message: Convert legacy browsing history into SQLite? The original data is kept. Continue?

diagDebugDescription.message: Show detailed diagnostics and debugging tools for developers.

diagDeficiencyNone.message: No deficiencies — all features are enabled.

diagDeficiencyNoOpfsDetail.message: OPFS (Origin Private File System) is not available in this environment.

diagDeficiencyNoOpfsAction.message: Upgrade to Chrome 102 or later. Currently using fallback storage.

diagDeficiencyNoSyncHandleDetail.message: FileSystemFileHandle.createSyncAccessHandle is not available outside Worker context.

diagDeficiencyNoSyncHandleAction.message: SyncAccessHandle is only available inside a Web Worker.

diagDeficiencyNoWorkerDetail.message: The Worker constructor is not available (CSP or browser restriction).

diagDeficiencyNoFts5Detail.message: FTS5 full-text search is not compiled into the SQLite WASM build.

diagDeficiencyNoFts5Action.message: Rebuild WASM with FTS5 enabled. LIKE-based search is used as fallback.

diagDeficiencyOpfsNoFts5Detail.message: The synchronous WASM build used by OPFS does not include FTS5. This is a known limitation.

diagDeficiencyOpfsNoFts5Action.message: LIKE-based search is used as fallback. To enable FTS5, rebuild wa-sqlite with FTS5 support.

diagDeficiencyInitFailedDetail.message: SQLite database initialization failed with an error.

diagDeficiencyInitFailedAction.message: Check browser version and clear extension data if needed.

diagDeficiencyNotInitializedDetail.message: The database has not been initialized yet.

diagDeficiencyNotInitializedAction.message: Reload the page or restart the extension.

diagDeficiencyFallbackDetail.message: Using chrome.storage.local as fallback. Native SQLite is not available.

diagDeficiencyFallbackAction.message: OPFS and IndexedDB are both unavailable. Check browser version.

diagDivergenceWarning.message: Environment detection mismatch between dashboard and offscreen.

domainFilterDescription.message: Control which sites are recorded by domain. Add sites you don't want recorded (e.g. banking, social media) to the blacklist, or use the whitelist to record only specific sites.

domainBlacklistDesc.message: Domains in the blacklist will NOT be recorded. All others will be recorded.

domainWhitelistDesc.message: Only domains in the whitelist will be recorded. All others will be ignored.

initialSetupDescription.message: Configure your Obsidian connection and AI settings.

advancedSettings.message: Advanced Settings (Protocol / Port / Daily Note Path)

recordingConditionsDesc.message: Set thresholds for automatic recording and AI processing.

tagsDescription.message: Configure tag categories and enable/disable automatic tag extraction during AI summarization.

tagSummaryModeDesc.message: Automatically add category tags to AI summaries based on content

categoryNameTooLong.message: Category name is too long (max 50 characters)

categoryNameInvalidChars.message: Category name contains invalid characters (|, # are not allowed)

registeredDomains.description: ARIA label for list of registered domains

newCategoryName.description: ARIA label for new category name input

filterOptions.description: ARIA label for history filter buttons

tagCategory.description: ARIA label for tag category select

hmacVerificationFailedConfirm.message:
Settings file signature verification failed.

Reason: HMAC secret may have changed (extension update/reload, etc.).

If this is a trusted settings file, click "OK" to force import.
If not, click "Cancel".

importNoSignature.message: Settings file does not contain a signature. Only signed files can be imported.

privacyConsentDesc.message: Before using Yasumaro, please review our Privacy Policy.

consentPoint1.message: All data is stored locally on your device

consentPoint2.message: No data is sent to developer servers

consentPoint3.message: Page content is sent only to your chosen AI provider

consentPoint4.message: You can delete all data by uninstalling the extension

consentCheckboxLabel.message: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy

consentRequired.message: Privacy consent is required to use this extension.

modelsDevDescription.message: Select from 70+ OpenAI-compatible providers (OpenRouter, Perplexity, DeepSeek, etc.)

contentTabPanelDescription.message: Automatically remove elements that may contain sensitive information from web pages.

contentStripHardEnabledDesc.message: Removes tags like input, password, script, iframe and their attributes.

contentStripKeywordEnabledDesc.message: Removes elements whose ID/class attributes contain specified keywords.

aiSummaryCleansingTabPanelDescription.message: Remove unnecessary information (image alt attributes, metadata, ads, navigation, social widgets) before AI summarization.

aiSummaryCleansingEnabledDesc.message: Remove unnecessary information before AI summarization.

aiSummaryCleansingAdsEnabledDesc.message: Remove ad-related elements (ad, advertisement, banner, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingNavEnabledDesc.message: Remove navigation and footer (nav, footer, header, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingSocialEnabledDesc.message: Remove comments and social widgets (comments, social, share, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingDeepEnabledDesc.message: Remove aside/figure/form/dialog/button/input/select/details, ARIA roles (banner/complementary, etc.), hidden elements (hidden/aria-hidden), empty elements, and elements matching cookie/popup/modal/author-info/legal/BEM-style class patterns.

aiSummaryCleansingLinkDensityEnabledDesc.message: Removes link-dense blocks like related article lists and navigation groups (elements with 70%+ link text ratio and 100+ characters).

aiSummaryCleansingJsonLdTitle.message: Remove JSON-LD script tags from the page (advanced)

aiSummaryCleansingLazyLoadTitle.message: Remove elements with lazy-load attributes such as data-src (advanced)

aiSummaryCleansingFixedDesc.message: Remove fixed position elements (position:fixed/sticky) - sticky banners on Yahoo!, Game8, etc.

aiSummaryCleansingRecommendDesc.message: Remove recommendation sections - related articles, recommended products, etc.

aiSummaryCleansingSnsPromoDesc.message: Remove SNS/Amazon promotional content - sponsored products, trends, etc.

aiSummaryCleansingPopupDesc.message: Remove popups, modals, and toast notifications.

aiSummaryCleansingPlatformDesc.message: Remove platform-specific noise (5ch/be images, YouTube comments, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingTextDensityDesc.message: Text density filtering (remove elements where link text is 70%+).

aiSummaryCleansingShortSeqDesc.message: Short sequence removal (remove when 5+ elements with ≤30 chars consecutive).

aiSummaryCleansingSymbolLineDesc.message: Short sequence removal (remove when 5+ elements with ≤30 chars consecutive).
Symbol-only line removal (lines with only | » ◀ ▶ etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingLinkParaDesc.message: Link-only paragraph removal (paragraphs ≤50 chars with only links).

aiSummaryCleansingEnhancedHiddenDesc.message: Enhanced hidden element removal (visibility:hidden, opacity:0, template, slot).

aiSummaryCleansingEmptyElemDesc.message: Empty element removal (div/span/p/section/article with no text or children).

aiSummaryCleansingJpLayoutDesc.message: JP BEM layout patterns (l-footer, p-entry__footer, c-button, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingJpNavigationDesc.message: JP navigation patterns (global-nav, gnav, breadcrumb, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingAuthorDesc.message: Author and meta info (author-profile, post-date, tag-list, etc.).

aiSummaryCleansingBodyProtectionEnabledD.message: If the body score drops below the threshold after cleansing, restore removed elements to protect the main article body.

aiSummaryCleansingBodyProtectionThreshol.message: Lower = stricter protection (50=strict), higher = looser (500=loose). Default: 200

trustTabPanelDescription.message: Determine the trustworthiness of websites you visit and choose appropriate responses.

safetyModeDesc.message: Strict trusts only stricter domains. Relaxed trusts more domains.

trustTierLabelDesc.message: Top domains from Tranco List are treated as trusted.

trancoTierDesc.message: Linked with Safety Mode. You can also change manually.

jpAnchorSectionDesc.message: Domains ending with these TLDs are automatically treated as trusted.

jpAnchorInvalidFormat.message: Invalid TLD format. Must start with dot (.)

sensitiveSectionDesc.message: Finance, Gaming, SNS, and similar domains are treated as warning targets.

whitelistSectionDesc.message: These domains are not warned even if included in the warning list.

alertFinanceDesc.message: Display warning when trying to record on financial sites.

alertSensitiveDesc.message: Display warning when trying to record on sites in the warning list.

alertUnverifiedDesc.message: Display warning when trying to record on unverified sites not in Tranco or JP-Anchor.

permissionSuggestHint.message: Frequently visited but not permitted. Allowing enables page recording.

allUrlsBannerDesc.message: Grant permission once to record pages across all websites.

conditionalCspEnabledDesc.message: Only include configured AI providers in CSP to improve security

selectProvidersDesc.message: Select the medium/small AI providers you want to use

cspResetConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to reset CSP settings?

cspDescription.message: Only include configured AI providers in CSP to improve security

breakingChangesDesc.message: v5.0.0 has updated the permission model. The `<all_urls>` permission has been removed for better security.

breakingChangesDesc2.message: The new model requires individual permission for each domain. Please verify you have permissions for:

breakingChangesPermissionList.message: Verify you have access to each domain shown below.

otherDomainsText.message: Other websites you visit (grant as prompted)

breakingChangesHelp.message: Tip: When recording a new website for the first time, you will be prompted to grant permission.

note_max_tokens_cost_control.message: This setting limits the amount of data sent to AI, helping to control API costs.

note_ai_timeout.message: Leave blank for auto (local LLM: 120s / cloud AI: 30s). Set a higher value for slow models like LM Studio or Ollama.

error_max_tokens_range.message: Please enter a value between 10 and 16,000 tokens

withdrawConsentConfirm.message: Withdrawing consent will disable some features. Continue?

deleteAllDataConfirm.message: This will permanently delete all stored data including settings, history, and API keys. This cannot be undone. Continue?

deleteAllDataSuccess.message: All data deleted. Please reconfigure the extension.

dataManagementDesc.message: You have the right to delete all data stored by this extension (GDPR Art. 17 / CCPA).

trancoUpdateNotificationDescription.message: The Tranco Top 1000 list has been updated. Please verify the changes to trusted domains.

trancoUpdateModalConfirmDescription.message: Update trusted domain checking with the new Tranco list

trancoUpdateModalDenyDescription.message: Continue using the old Tranco list. You will be prompted for confirmation in 30 days.

trancoUpdateModalRetryLaterDescription.message: Keep using the old list for now. You will be prompted for confirmation in 30 days.

trancoSectionDescription.message: Trusted domain management based on Tranco Top 1000 list

fallbackStorageWarning.message: Running in fallback storage mode. OPFS is not available in your environment, using chrome.storage.local. Search functionality is limited.

triggerScrollTimeDesc.message: Record when scroll depth ≥50% and visit duration ≥5s

triggerValidationAtLeastOne.message: At least one trigger must be enabled.

cleansingStatsNoData.message: No reduction rate data available. Enable cleansing and record a few pages to see statistics.

criticalAlertBody.message: A critical error occurred: $1. Check the Diagnostics panel in settings.

sqliteAlertMessage.message: History database initialization has failed repeatedly. Check the Diagnostics panel in settings.
